summary: Iteration 59: Phase 5 Registrations Module Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All Phase 5 features verified working - admin registrations page, config dialog, promo codes, public registration form with add-ons and custom questions.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts render with -1 dimensions initially (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning, doesn't affect functionality)
HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - caused by React dynamic rendering wrapper (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)

registration_events.GET /api/admin/registrations/events: PASS - Returns registration-enabled events with counts

registration_config.GET /api/admin/registrations/configs/{ev: PASS - Returns config with add-ons, questions, promo codes

registrants.GET /api/admin/registrations/{eventId}/r: PASS - Returns registrant list with status breakdown

promo_codes.POST /api/admin/registrations/{eventId}/: PASS - Adds promo code to config

public_registration.GET /api/register/{eventId}: PASS - Returns public-facing event data (no sensitive promo data)
public_registration.POST /api/register/{eventId}: PASS - Submits registration with name, email, add-ons, custom answers

total_calculation.base_price_plus_addons: PASS - Correctly calculates total = base price + selected add-ons

admin_registrations_page.page_loads: PASS - /registrations page loads with registration events list
admin_registrations_page.event_expansion: PASS - Expanding event shows registrants table with actions
admin_registrations_page.configure_button: PASS - Opens config dialog with pricing, add-ons, custom questions
admin_registrations_page.add_promo_code: PASS - Add Promo Code dialog works with code, type, value, max uses
admin_registrations_page.copy_link: PASS - Copy Registration Link button present
admin_registrations_page.sidebar_nav: PASS - Registrations nav link in MINISTRY section with ClipboardList icon

public_registration_page.page_loads: PASS - /register/{eventId} renders event details and form
public_registration_page.form_fields: PASS - Has name, email, phone, custom questions, add-ons, promo code fields
public_registration_page.total_calculation: PASS - Total updates when add-ons selected ($30 base + $5 addon = $35)
public_registration_page.form_submission: PASS - Submitting shows success page with total amount
public_registration_page.success_page: PASS - Shows 'Registration Confirmed!' with total and SolomonPay pending note

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 5 endpoints properly implement tenant isolation via tenant_id
Public registration endpoint correctly strips sensitive promo code data
Total calculation correctly sums base price + selected add-ons
Waitlist auto-triggers when event at capacity (waitlist_enabled config)
SolomonPay payments are MOCKED - all payment_status is 'pending'
seed_data_creation: Test data created with 'TEST_' prefix for registrations, add-ons, custom questions (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified Phase 5 Registrations Module: admin registration management with config editor (pricing, add-ons, custom questions, promo codes), registrant table with status actions, public registration page with form submission and total calculation. All backend endpoints working (13/13 tests). All frontend UI elements present and functional. Note: Welcome modal appears on first login - dismiss by clicking 'I'll figure it out myself' link. MOCKED: SolomonPay payment processing (all payments pending).

mocked_apis_list: SolomonPay payment processing - all payment_status is 'pending'
